notes: Added Rgba32Float data-texture descriptor/extent/BGL helpers in poly_data.rs (data_texture_extent, data_texture_descriptor, data_texture_bgl_entries) sized for polygon count, asserting <= downlevel_webgl2_defaults max_texture_dimension_2d (2048). Wired creation into run_web (placeholder) and load_level_into (sized to map.polygons.len()) with bind group + non-filtering sampler, group 2 in pipeline layout, bound in frame(). 3 new unit tests pass (extent vs polygon count incl. limit/overflow, descriptor format/usage, BGL vertex+fragment visibility). Native cargo test green; wasm32 cargo check green.
